title: pauridia affinis
intro: Pauridia affinis is a species of flowering plant in the family Hypoxidaceae, commonly known as the yellow star or grass-leaved pauridia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pauridia affinis include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its roots are also used in traditional medicine.
